title: SCBE coding agent Qwen Stage 6 repair v9 (must-pass boost)
description: v9 retry after v8 if the executable promotion gate still misses must_pass tokens. Adds the stage6_must_pass_boost shard (270 rows = 90 per kind across resource_jump_cancel / lane_separation / hex_trace) so that transmit_burst, queue_drain_guard, and crc_patch each appear in at least 72 training rows, lifting their coverage roughly 8x over v8. Every boost row passes the same _assert_row_vocabulary checks used by the stage6 repair builder. Local-only run; no HF push until the executable promotion gate clears.
system_prompt: You are an SCBE-AETHERMOORE GeoSeal command-line coding agent. Preserve token-to-binary/hex flow across code, semantic overlay, structural chemistry frame, and resource-aware workflow composition. Keep material chemistry separate from structural chemistry templates, predict resource overruns before commit, and use steady-state fallback plus re-advance when a launch would exceed budget.

evaluation.notes: Must clear the frozen Stage 6 unseen contract via scripts/eval/score_stage6_regression.py before any HF push. v9 specifically targets the must_pass token vocabulary shortfall observed in v7/v8.
